task.objective: Deliver complete Phase 1 kernel input through a bounded local CLI.

forbidden: modification of existing Machine Task Contracts
repository inspection, target execution, verification execution, network, GitHub, or external services
Trusted Configuration, Evidence Contract, or Policy establishment, discovery, selection, or defaulting
authoritative record, reason-code, lineage, identity, or Verdict creation outside the accepted kernel
inference, product-semantic, protocol, readiness, release, or broad-admissibility changes or claims

requirements: Commit this contract alone as the first branch commit.
Add private @proofrail/static-evaluator whose only runtime workspace dependency is @proofrail/kernel.
Require --input, optionally accept --output, and reject unknown, duplicate, or missing-value arguments.
Read one regular local file up to 1 MiB as strict UTF-8, parse JSON, and pass the value unchanged to exactly one evaluateKernel call.
Emit only the returned finalized bundle as deterministic JSON with exactly one trailing newline; stdout and file bytes must match.
Use fixed bounded errors that reveal no input content, paths, kernel details, or secret-like values.

Add sanitized input and golden fixtures plus tests for direct-kernel equality, stdout/file output, determinism, invalid arguments, malformed/oversized/non-UTF-8 input, invalid kernel shape, and secret non-disclosure.
Add root evaluate, demo, and test scripts; include focused tests in pnpm verify; update only the workspace lock link and concise README boundary text.
Preserve contracts, kernel, Evidence Gate, authority documents, existing outputs, and existing task contracts byte-for-byte.
Do not inspect or execute targets, use network/GitHub/models/credentials/cost-risk services, establish trust, select Policy or Evidence Contracts, or create or alter authoritative records.

requiredInvariants: Every changed path is writable and this contract is the first branch commit.
The CLI only performs bounded file I/O, strict decoding, JSON parsing, one kernel call, and unchanged result serialization.
Identical accepted input produces byte-identical output with one trailing newline.
No external dependency, target execution, network, inference, semantic, authority, readiness, or release change is introduced.

requiredArtifacts: root scripts and workspace lock link
stopConditions: Contracts, kernel, authority, protocol, Verdict, Trust, Evidence authority, or product semantics must change: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Trust establishment, selection, authoritative record creation, receipts, or target execution is required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
External dependencies, network, credentials, billing, credits, paid cloud, or paid SaaS are required: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
The accepted kernel result must be altered or reinterpreted: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Codex usage limit is reached: LIMIT_REACHED
